case_title: ROSSY MARIN VS. JOHN PHI ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (SEALED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARIN, ROSSY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-13-2023 CONTINUED TO FEB-14-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-26-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-14-2024 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 100206171) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARIN, ROSSY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS. (TRANSACTION ID # 210067227)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-26-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100206171) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARIN, ROSSY AS TO DEFENDANT PHI, JOHN PHI, MAI DOES 1 TO 10. SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 100206171) TO PLAINTIFF MARIN, ROSSY
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF MARIN, ROSSY
